overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a lush meadow with wildflowers, transitioning into a forested area and wading through a shallow river toward a wooden structure.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path through a grassy meadow with wildflowers on both sides

entered.detail: winding brown dirt trail through the meadow
tall green grass lining the left side of the path
tall green grass lining the right side of the path
purple wildflowers scattered in the grass
red poppy-like flowers on the right side
sparse deciduous trees in the distance
sparse deciduous trees in the distance
bright blue sky with scattered white clouds

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through an open meadow bathed in bright sunlight. Tall grass and colorful wildflowers line the trail, with sparse trees visible in the distance under a blue sky with scattered clouds.

events.description: trail becomes more enclosed as trees close in from both sides
river water becomes visible ahead where the path ends

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path as it approaches a river, with denser forest on both sides

entered.detail: shimmering water visible at the end of the trail
hazy mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through increasingly dense forest with trees closing in from both sides, partially obscuring the sky. The path becomes marshy as it approaches a river visible in the distance, with mountains appearing on the horizon.

events.description: character steps from dry ground into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading through the shallow river water, moving from the bank into the stream

entered.detail: clear shallow water covering the ground with visible riverbed
grassy bank with vegetation on the left side
grassy bank with vegetation on the right side

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps into a shallow river, the water replacing the dirt path underfoot. He wades through the clear stream surrounded by grassy banks and dense trees on both sides, with the water reflecting the sky above.

events.description: character turns slightly to the right while continuing through water
wooden dock posts come into view on the far bank ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading through the river and approaching a wooden dock structure on the far bank, turning slightly to navigate

entered.detail: vertical wooden posts marking the edge of a dock
small wooden dock structure on the river bank

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the shallow river, Geralt turns slightly toward a wooden dock structure with vertical posts visible on the approaching bank. The water remains clear and shallow as he approaches the far side of the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a bright, open meadow gradually transforms into a dense forest and a shallow river crossing. It begins with Geralt walking along a sunlit dirt path lined with tall grass and colorful wildflowers under a scattered cloudy sky. As the trail progresses, the environment shifts into a dense forest where the trees close in and the ground becomes marshy, revealing distant mountains on the horizon. The scene then transitions as Geralt steps off the path and into a clear, shallow river, wading through the reflecting water between grassy banks. Finally, the camera follows him across the stream as he turns toward a wooden dock structure with vertical posts on the approaching bank.
